headlines.title: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
headlines.description: A minister confirms talks have taken place but says there will be no mandatory cap on essential food prices.

headlines.title: Inflation falls to 2.8% but is expected to rise from here
headlines.description: Energy prices were lower due to the government's energy bill support package and lower wholesale prices before the Iran war.

headlines.title: Arsenal fans and players celebrate title at Emirates at 5am
headlines.description: Arsenal have had to wait 22 years to celebrate a title win, and both the club's players and fans made sure to savour every second of it on Tuesday night.

headlines.title: Kylie Minogue reveals she had second cancer diagnosis in 2021
headlines.description: In a new documentary, the star says she "got through it, again" following successful treatment in 2005.

headlines.title: Was Married at First Sight UK an 'accident waiting to happen'?
headlines.description: Channel 4 has wider questions to answer after allegations made by three women who took part in the show.

headlines.title: Boss of Sarah Ferguson-linked firm used royal links to threaten worker with jail
headlines.description: In a recording obtained by the BBC, the worker was threatened with jail for allegedly hacking emails at lifestyle app vVoosh.

headlines.title: Moped riding in shop is not a surprise on 'forgotten estate'
headlines.description: Residents of a Grimsby estate blame anti-social behaviour on a lack of facilities for young people.

headlines.title: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
headlines.description: The waiver reflects increasing supply concerns over certain fuels due to the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Trump exerts iron grip on Republican Party with Massie defeated
headlines.description: Victory over a Republican rebel in Kentucky shows the president's strength but his power comes with risks for the midterms.

headlines.title: Inside Arsenal's title win with boats, fire and a TikTok song
headlines.description: The inside story of how Mikel Arteta turned Arsenal from 'nearly men' into Premier League winners.

headlines.title: In Texas, Trump has backed a loyal ally - but he comes with baggage
headlines.description: Trump's move dismayed Senate Republicans, many of whom have served with the Texan for decades.

headlines.title: 'Adenomyosis may be invisible, its impact is not'
headlines.description: One in 10 women live with adenomyosis yet sufferers say their pain is often dismissed.

headlines.title: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
headlines.description: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.

headlines.title: What's happening to UK petrol and diesel prices?
headlines.description: Motoring group RAC warns pump prices could keep rising if there is no resolution to the Iran war.

headlines.title: Adverts for sexual assault DNA self-swab kits banned as misleading
headlines.description: The Advertising Standards Authority has ruled Enough's online posts contained unproven claims.

headlines.title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
headlines.description: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

headlines.title: Dozens arrested as specialist team targets romance fraudsters and scammers
headlines.description: The specialist team of financial crime experts is working "in the shadows" to hunt down scammers online.

headlines.title: UK should set maximum working temperature rules, advisers say
headlines.description: Successive governments have failed to prepare the UK for extreme heat, the climate watchdog says.

headlines.title: Abusive nursery worker's deportation 'horrendous'
headlines.description: Roksana Lecka served 14 months of an eight-year sentence before she was deported to Poland.

headlines.title: British couple on new hunger strike in Iranian jail, family say
headlines.description: Lindsay and Craig Foreman, from East Sussex, have each spent several days refusing food, their family says.

headlines.title: Deputy British ambassador to US abruptly leaves post
headlines.description: Until his sudden departure, James Roscoe held one the most senior, high-profile roles in the British diplomatic service

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: The £100Bn HS2 Debacle
headlines.description: HS2 could now cost over £100bn, but government vows to deliver project “to completion”.

headlines.title: Americanswers... on 5 Live! Has Zohran Mamdani achieved a miracle in New York?
headlines.description: The new mayor says he’s rescued NYC from its budget crisis

headlines.title: Boats, fire and a TikTok song - inside Arsenal's title win
headlines.description: The inside story of how Mikel Arteta turned Arsenal from 'nearly men' into Premier League winners.

headlines.title: A just or harsh punishment? Reaction to Southampton expulsion
headlines.description: Southampton will be playing in the Championship next season after they were expelled from the play-offs following their admission that they spied on three league rivals this season.

headlines.title: The crucial split-second call that could deny Spurs safety
headlines.description: A controversial split-second call leaves Tottenham are left fighting for Premier League survival and dignity to avoid the ultimate humiliation on the last day of the season, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

headlines.title: Arsenal players celebrate title at Emirates at 5am
headlines.description: Arsenal have had to wait 22 years to celebrate a title win, and both the club's players and fans made sure to savour every second of it on Tuesday night.

headlines.title: Emery eyes fifth Europa crown but denies being 'king' of competition
headlines.description: Aston Villa are aiming to end a 30-year trophy drought in Istanbul on Wednesday.

headlines.title: NRL star Arrow retires at 30 after MND diagnosis
headlines.description: South Sydney Rabbitohs forward Jai Arrow announces his immediate retirement after being diagnosed with Motor Neurone Disease (MND) at the age of 30.
